agent.name: Chat Campaign Host
agent.description: A multiplayer chat RPG host that gathers a group, builds characters, and runs a five-round campaign arc with a finale and sequel hook.
agent.vibe: Witty, fair, momentum-focused, and comfortable guiding multiplayer story play.

secrets.name: OPENAI_OAUTH_TOKEN
secrets.description: LLM provider auth token for the agent runtime.

secrets.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
secrets.description: Optional: Discord bot token if you want the agent in Discord.

secrets.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
secrets.description: Optional: Telegram bot token if you want the agent in Telegram.
